ohtani.title: Max Muncy hits game-winning homer in Dodgers’ win
ohtani.blurb: Max Muncy’s late two-run homer and Roki Sasaki’s solid start propel the Dodgers in their 2-1 win over the Yankees

imanaga.title: Greene, De La Cruz propel Reds to 4-0 victory
imanaga.blurb: A dozen strikeouts from Hunter Greene, and a two-hit day for Elly De La Cruz lead the Reds to a 4-0 shutout win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Busch, Hoerner, Boyd guide Cubs to 6-2 win over Twins
suzuki.blurb: Michael Busch homers in the 1st, Nico Hoerner goes 4-for-4 and Matthew Boyd pitches a quality start in the Cubs' 6-2 win over the Twins

yoshida.title: Wilyer Abreu's two homers spark Red Sox's comeback win
yoshida.blurb: Wilyer Abreu hits two home runs and Jahmai Jones hits his first Red Sox homer to propel Boston to a 7-6 comeback win over the Rays

okamoto.title: Shane Bieber, Blue Jays' pen blank White Sox in win
okamoto.blurb: Shane Bieber strikes out six batters over six scoreless innings to lift the Blue Jays to a 1-0 win over the White Sox

murakami.title: Shane Bieber, Blue Jays' pen blank White Sox in win
murakami.blurb: Shane Bieber strikes out six batters over six scoreless innings to lift the Blue Jays to a 1-0 win over the White Sox

matsui.title: Ty France's home run propels Padres to one-run win
matsui.blurb: Ty France delivers a go-ahead home run to power the Padres to an 8-7 win over the Blue Jays
